title: StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies family as a Subject Matter Expert in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies:
StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies!
